comments: This tool was built to address a gap in existing accessibility tooling. Most contrast checkers only report pass or fail results. Smart Color Contrast Checker additionally provides ML-based color suggestions to help designers and developers find accessible alternatives without manual trial and error. A companion Figma plugin is also available at https://www.figma.com/community/plugin/1548100074928472068
features: Smart Color Contrast Checker is a free, no-login web tool that checks WCAG color contrast compliance and uses ML-based suggestions to automatically recommend accessible color alternatives when a combination fails. Also available as a Figma plugin for in-workflow use.
title: Smart Color Contrast Assistant
